description: ## Component: hx-slider (NEW) **Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries** Range slider for numeric value selection with optional labels and tick marks. ### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component) Properties control min/max/step/value. Slots for label/help. ### API Design **Properties:** `name`, `value`, `min`, `max`, `step`, `disabled`, `label`, `help-text`, `show-value` (boolean), `show-ticks` (boolean), `hx-size` **Slots:** Default (label), `help`, `min-label`, `max-label` **CSS Parts:** `slider`, `track`, `fill`, `thumb`, `label`, `value-display`, `tick` **Events:** `hx-input` (continuous), `hx-change` (on release) (composed: true) ### Drupal Integration ```twig Pain Level (0-10) No Pain Worst Pain ``` ### ElementInternals: Submits numeric value ### Healthcare: Pain scales, satisfaction surveys, dosage adjustment ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Smooth drag interaction with value update 2. Keyboard: Arrow keys adjust by step 3. Value display updates in real-time 4. Tick marks at step intervals when enabled 5. ElementInternals form participation 6. WCAG 2.1 AA: slider role, valuemin/max/now
title: T1-13: hx-slider — Range Value Selection
